texto: Your life must not be static
autor: you must keep on moving forward towards the higher goal. No obstacle can stop a man who is committed to a single calling or to a single prize
explicacao: Orientação direta de you must keep on moving forward towards the higher goal. No obstacle can stop a man who is committed to a single calling or to a single prize sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “Your life must not be static” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, sunday-adelaja, static, útil em momentos de reflexao.
